lines: Yemw' abasubir' iyo muva, I kuzimu kwa Nyamutezi, Mukarekur' Umusaraba, Ko muneshejwe ?
Yes' ubw' azagaruka, Aje kwim' ingoma ve, Tuzamurebesh' amas' as' ate,
Ubw' utihanira gukizwa, Ukaturir' abantu gusa,Ngo bakumenye k' ukijijwe,
Ubw' ur' umuntu w'umwigisha, Wigish' abant' iby'Uwiteka, Ntubageze ku
Ubw' ur' umunyangeso nziza, Ushyitsa byose by'Itorero, Ntusohore ku
Ubw' ur' umunyabwenge bwinshi, Byos' uzi no kubigenzura,K' uyobew'
Ubw' ur' umunyesoni nyinshi, Utinya kwihana ng' ukizwe, Wibwira kw ar'
Ngik' icyambu cy'amaraso ye, Wirohemo, wa mutindi we. Hi kub' agace
